name: SMA VWAP Institutional Flow Alignment
edge_hypothesis: VWAP_D has NEVER been tested as a strategy component despite being computed in the indicator library since day 1. Every ACCEPT uses momentum/oscillator combinations — ZERO strategies have tested institutional flow alignment. VWAP represents the volume-weighted average price anchored to the daily session, making it the closest proxy for institutional fair value available. SMA_50 represents the 50-period simple trend — the most universally watched level by retail and algorithmic participants. When close crosses above SMA_50 AND close > VWAP_D, both structural trend (SMA_50 cross = trend reversal) and institutional flow (price above VWAP = buyers in control) agree simultaneously. This dual-agreement from DIFFERENT market participant types creates a fundamentally different signal source than any existing strategy. The mechanism is NOT transition-detection or mean-reversion — it is FLOW ALIGNMENT: the entry happens when retail trend direction (SMA) and institutional fair value position (VWAP) confirm each other. Expected edge in ranging-to-transitional regimes where VWAP acts as an anchor that institutional algorithms defend, and the SMA cross provides the directional trigger.

variants.name: sma_vwap_flow_v1_8to1
variants.description: Core variant. SMA_50 cross (directional trigger) + VWAP_D position (institutional flow gate). 8:1 R:R sweet spot. FIRST EVER strategy to use VWAP_D as a component. Tests whether institutional flow alignment provides exploitable edge.

components.notes: SMA_50 cross — universally watched trend level. Directional trigger.
Daily VWAP — institutional fair value proxy. FIRST EVER use in a strategy spec.

variants.name: sma_vwap_flow_v2_7to1
variants.description: Tighter TP variant. 7:1 R:R (10.5x ATR TP). SMA_50 cross entries may not produce extended runs — the 50-period MA generates signals at intermediate trend points rather than early transitions. 7:1 captures more complete winners while maintaining high R:R. Tests TP sensitivity for flow-alignment entries.

components.notes: SMA_50 cross trigger with tighter TP.
VWAP institutional flow gate — 7:1 for intermediate trend signals.

variants.name: sma_vwap_flow_v3_wide_8to1
variants.description: Wide stop variant. 2.0 ATR stop + 16x ATR TP (8:1 R:R maintained). SMA_50 crossings can occur at volatile points — wider stop prevents whipsaw losses at the cross level. Tests whether flow-alignment entries benefit from more breathing room.

components.notes: SMA_50 cross with wider stop for volatile cross-zone protection.
VWAP flow gate — wider framework for robust entry.
2.0x stop / 16x TP — 8:1 R:R with whipsaw protection.

advisory_context.novel_element: FIRST EVER use of VWAP_D in a strategy spec. New mechanism class: flow alignment (not transition-detection, not mean-reversion). Tests whether institutional fair value positioning provides exploitable edge.

indicator_roles.baseline: SMA_50 — 50-period simple moving average cross as directional trigger
indicator_roles.confirmation: VWAP_D — daily VWAP institutional fair value position gate
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — position sizing and R:R framework
